p-1.plaintext: Define custom block types directly in your frontend configuration via the `blocks` option in `initBridge`. No Volto plugin deployment required. Each block type needs an `id`, `title`, and a `blockSchema` with its field properties.

children.text: Define custom block types directly in your frontend configuration via the `blocks` option in `initBridge`. No Volto plugin deployment required. Each block type needs an `id`, `title`, and a `blockSchema` with its field properties.

tabs.label: Javascript

p-3.plaintext: Child block types (like `slide` above) must be defined at the top level of `blocks`. You can also:

children.text: Child block types (like `slide` above) must be defined at the top level of `blocks`. You can also:

ul-4.plaintext: Set `restricted: true` to hide a block from the block chooser (only usable as child blocks) Set `mostUsed: true` to pin a block to the top of the chooser Set `disableCustomSidebarEditForm: true` to use only the schema form in the sidebar (no custom edit component) Use `fieldsets` in the schema to organize fields into tabs

children.text: Set `restricted: true` to hide a block from the block chooser (only usable as child blocks)
Set `mostUsed: true` to pin a block to the top of the chooser
Set `disableCustomSidebarEditForm: true` to use only the schema form in the sidebar (no custom edit component)
Use `fieldsets` in the schema to organize fields into tabs

p-6.plaintext: Schema enhancers modify block schemas dynamically:

children.text: Schema enhancers modify block schemas dynamically:

tabs.label: Javascript

p-8.plaintext: **`fieldRules`**: Add, remove, or conditionally modify field definitions.

children.text: **`fieldRules`**: Add, remove, or conditionally modify field definitions.

ul-9.plaintext: Condition operators: `is`, `isNot`, `isSet`, `isNotSet`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte` Field paths: `../field` for parent block, `/field` for root

children.text: Field paths: `../field` for parent block, `/field` for root

p-11.plaintext: If a block type has a `fieldMappings` defined it will enable a "Convert to..." UI action. You specify either conversions to a specific type, or to a generic search result schema (`@id`, `title`, `preview-image`, `description`):

children.text: If a block type has a `fieldMappings` defined it will enable a "Convert to..." UI action. You specify either conversions to a specific type, or to a generic search result schema (`@id`, `title`, `preview-image`, `description`):

tabs.label: Javascript

p-13.plaintext: Transitive conversions are performed automatically by using paths through intermediate types (e.g., `hero -> teaser -> image`). Any fields that don't match will still be kept in the data so if the block is converted back that data will reappear.

children.text: Transitive conversions are performed automatically by using paths through intermediate types (e.g., `hero -> teaser -> image`). Any fields that don't match will still be kept in the data so if the block is converted back that data will reappear.

description: Define custom block types, schema enhancers, and block conversion mappings.
title: Custom Blocks
